_comment: Single numeric source for benchmark gate bars. Gates (m32/m38/m39) READ this file; docs and the marketing site cite artifacts produced against it. Change a bar here, never inline in a script. ram_mib mirrors the m32 budgets; load thresholds are per-tier p95/error bars for the 60s m38 smoke at the tier's advertised rps; scale holds the m39 targets.

load._comment: p95 in ms for the canonical CRUD mix THROUGH Kong at the smoke rps; err_pct is the failed-request budget (429s count as failures — the smoke rate must be sustainable). smoke rps == the tier's advertised rps except max, held at 800 until bench-capacity measures the true ceiling (Phase C then reconciles the advertised number with the measurement — that reconciliation IS the offer revision).

capacity._comment: Saturation criteria for bench-capacity: ramp until p95 exceeds slo_p95_ms or errors exceed err_pct.

scale._comment: m39 targets. smoke_tenants runs inside verify-all; full_tenants is the on-demand 10K validation. p99_factor = allowed p99 multiple vs the single-tenant baseline artifact.
